---
title: "財務分析ダッシュボード"
output:
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
    orientation: columns
    vertical_layout: fill
    theme:
      bootswatch: flatly
    navbar:
      - {title: "有価証券報告書", align: right}
params:
  pl_file:      "input_pl.csv"
  bs_file:      "input_bs.csv"
  summary_file: "input_summary.csv"
  company_name: "ヒューマン・メタボローム・テクノロジーズ (6090)"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(flexdashboard)
library(plotly)
library(dplyr)
library(DT)

# ── CSV読み込み ───────────────────────────────────────
pl      <- read.csv(params$pl_file,      fileEncoding = "UTF-8-BOM", check.names = FALSE)
bs      <- read.csv(params$bs_file,      fileEncoding = "UTF-8-BOM", check.names = FALSE)
summary5 <- read.csv(params$summary_file, fileEncoding = "UTF-8-BOM", check.names = FALSE)

# ── 期名の取得（最後の2列を前期・当期とする）────────────────
pl_periods  <- tail(colnames(pl)[colnames(pl) != "項目"], 2)
bs_periods  <- tail(colnames(bs)[!colnames(bs) %in% c("区分","項目")], 2)
period_prev <- pl_periods[1]   # 前期
period_curr <- pl_periods[2]   # 当期

# ── ヘルパー関数 ──────────────────────────────────────
get_pl <- function(item) {
  as.numeric(pl[pl$項目 == item, period_curr])
}
get_pl_prev <- function(item) {
  as.numeric(pl[pl$項目 == item, period_prev])
}
get_bs <- function(item, period = period_curr) {
  as.numeric(bs[bs$項目 == item, period])
}
fmt_oku <- function(x) paste0(round(x / 100000, 1), "億円")
fmt_pct <- function(x) paste0(round(x, 1), "%")

# ── KPI計算 ───────────────────────────────────────────
rev_curr   <- get_pl("売上高")
rev_prev   <- get_pl_prev("売上高")
op_curr    <- get_pl("営業利益")
ni_curr    <- get_pl("当期純利益")
gp_curr    <- get_pl("売上総利益")

asset_curr <- get_bs("資産合計")
ca_curr    <- get_bs("流動資産合計")
cl_curr    <- get_bs("流動負債合計")
eq_curr    <- get_bs("純資産合計")
liab_curr  <- get_bs("負債合計")

roe_curr   <- tail(summary5$ROE, 1)
equity_r   <- round(eq_curr / asset_curr * 100, 1)
cur_ratio  <- round(ca_curr / cl_curr * 100, 1)

# ── カラーパレット ────────────────────────────────────
col_main    <- "#2c7bb6"
col_sub     <- "#f77f00"
col_neg     <- "#d73027"
col_pos     <- "#1a9641"
col_neutral <- "#999999"
```

```{r title_setup, include=FALSE}
# タイトルにparams反映
```

---
title: "`r paste('財務分析ダッシュボード｜', params$company_name)`"
---

業績サマリー
=====================================

Column {data-width=220}
-------------------------------------

### 当期売上高 {.value-box}
```{r}
valueBox(fmt_oku(rev_curr), icon = "fa-chart-line", color = col_main)
```

### 売上総利益率 {.value-box}
```{r}
valueBox(fmt_pct(gp_curr / rev_curr * 100), icon = "fa-percent", color = col_sub)
```

### 営業利益率 {.value-box}
```{r}
valueBox(fmt_pct(op_curr / rev_curr * 100), icon = "fa-percent", color = col_pos)
```

### 純利益率 {.value-box}
```{r}
valueBox(fmt_pct(ni_curr / rev_curr * 100), icon = "fa-percent", color = col_pos)
```

### 自己資本比率 {.value-box}
```{r}
valueBox(fmt_pct(equity_r), icon = "fa-shield", color = col_main)
```

### ROE {.value-box}
```{r}
valueBox(fmt_pct(roe_curr), icon = "fa-yen-sign", color = col_sub)
```

Column {data-width=500}
-------------------------------------

### 売上高・利益トレンド

```{r}
plot_ly(summary5, x = ~決算年月) %>%
  add_bars(y = ~売上高, name = "売上高",
           marker = list(color = col_main)) %>%
  add_lines(y = ~経常利益, name = "経常利益",
            line = list(color = col_sub, width = 3),
            marker = list(size = 8)) %>%
  add_lines(y = ~当期純利益, name = "当期純利益",
            line = list(color = col_pos, width = 3),
            marker = list(size = 8)) %>%
  layout(
    xaxis = list(title = ""),
    yaxis = list(title = "千円", tickformat = ",d"),
    legend = list(orientation = "h", y = -0.15),
    hovermode = "x unified", margin = list(t = 30)
  )
```

Column {data-width=280}
-------------------------------------

### ROE・自己資本比率トレンド

```{r}
plot_ly(summary5, x = ~決算年月) %>%
  add_lines(y = ~ROE, name = "ROE (%)",
            line = list(color = col_sub, width = 3), marker = list(size = 8)) %>%
  add_lines(y = ~自己資本比率, name = "自己資本比率 (%)",
            line = list(color = col_main, width = 3), marker = list(size = 8)) %>%
  layout(
    xaxis = list(title = ""),
    yaxis = list(title = "%", range = c(0, 100)),
    legend = list(orientation = "h", y = -0.15),
    hovermode = "x unified", margin = list(t = 30)
  )
```

### EPSトレンド

```{r}
plot_ly(summary5, x = ~決算年月, y = ~EPS, type = "bar",
        marker = list(color = col_main)) %>%
  layout(xaxis = list(title = ""), yaxis = list(title = "円"),
         margin = list(t = 30))
```


損益計算書
=====================================

Column {data-width=420}
-------------------------------------

### 利益構造ウォーターフォール（当期）

```{r}
wf_labels <- c("売上高","売上原価","売上総利益","販管費","営業利益",
               "営業外(純)","経常利益","特別損益(純)","純利益")
wf_values <- c(
  get_pl("売上高"),
  -get_pl("売上原価"),
  NA,
  -get_pl("販売費及び一般管理費"),
  NA,
  get_pl("営業外収益合計") - get_pl("営業外費用合計"),
  NA,
  get_pl("特別利益合計") - get_pl("特別損失合計"),
  NA
)
wf_measure <- c("absolute","relative","total","relative","total",
                "relative","total","relative","total")

plot_ly(x = wf_labels, y = wf_values,
        type = "waterfall", measure = wf_measure,
        connector = list(line = list(color = "#aaa")),
        increasing = list(marker = list(color = col_pos)),
        decreasing = list(marker = list(color = col_neg)),
        totals     = list(marker = list(color = col_main))) %>%
  layout(
    xaxis = list(title = ""),
    yaxis = list(title = "千円", tickformat = ",d"),
    showlegend = FALSE, margin = list(t = 30)
  )
```

Column {data-width=280}
-------------------------------------

### 利益率比較（前期→当期）

```{r}
labels <- c("売上総利益率","営業利益率","経常利益率","純利益率")
items  <- c("売上総利益","営業利益","経常利益","当期純利益")
prev_rates <- sapply(items, function(i) get_pl_prev(i) / rev_prev * 100)
curr_rates <- sapply(items, function(i) get_pl(i)      / rev_curr * 100)

rates <- data.frame(指標 = labels,
                    前期 = prev_rates,
                    当期 = curr_rates)

plot_ly(rates, y = ~指標) %>%
  add_bars(x = ~前期, name = period_prev, orientation = "h",
           marker = list(color = col_neutral)) %>%
  add_bars(x = ~当期, name = period_curr, orientation = "h",
           marker = list(color = col_main)) %>%
  layout(
    barmode = "group",
    xaxis = list(title = "%", ticksuffix = "%"),
    yaxis = list(title = ""),
    legend = list(orientation = "h", y = -0.15),
    margin = list(t = 30)
  )
```

### 費用構造（当期）

```{r}
plot_ly(
  labels = c("売上原価","販管費","営業利益"),
  values = c(get_pl("売上原価"),
             get_pl("販売費及び一般管理費"),
             get_pl("営業利益")),
  type = "pie",
  marker = list(colors = c(col_neg, col_neutral, col_pos)),
  textinfo = "label+percent",
  hole = 0.4
) %>%
  layout(showlegend = TRUE,
         legend = list(orientation = "h", y = -0.1),
         margin = list(t = 10))
```

Column {data-width=300}
-------------------------------------

### 損益計算書 詳細

```{r}
pl_disp <- pl %>%
  mutate(
    増減額 = .data[[period_curr]] - .data[[period_prev]],
    増減率 = paste0(ifelse(増減額 >= 0, "＋", ""),
                   round(増減額 / abs(.data[[period_prev]]) * 100, 1), "%")
  ) %>%
  mutate(across(c(all_of(period_prev), all_of(period_curr), 増減額),
                ~format(., big.mark = ",")))

datatable(
  pl_disp,
  colnames = c("項目", paste0(period_prev,"（千円）"),
               paste0(period_curr,"（千円）"), "増減額", "増減率"),
  rownames = FALSE,
  options = list(pageLength = 15, dom = "t", ordering = FALSE),
  class = "compact stripe"
)
```


貸借対照表
=====================================

Column {data-width=350}
-------------------------------------

### 資産構成の変化

```{r}
asset_items <- c("現金及び預金","売掛金","その他流動資産",
                 "有形固定資産","無形固定資産","投資その他の資産")
bs_asset <- bs %>%
  filter(区分 == "資産", 項目 %in% asset_items) %>%
  mutate(項目 = factor(項目, levels = asset_items))

asset_long <- bind_rows(
  bs_asset %>% mutate(期 = period_prev, 金額 = .data[[period_prev]]),
  bs_asset %>% mutate(期 = period_curr, 金額 = .data[[period_curr]])
) %>% select(期, 項目, 金額)

plot_ly(asset_long, x = ~期, y = ~金額, color = ~項目,
        type = "bar",
        colors = c("#2166ac","#4393c3","#92c5de","#f4a582","#d6604d","#b2182b")) %>%
  layout(
    barmode = "stack",
    xaxis = list(title = ""),
    yaxis = list(title = "千円", tickformat = ",d"),
    legend = list(orientation = "h", y = -0.2),
    margin = list(t = 30)
  )
```

### 負債・純資産構成の変化

```{r}
liab_items <- c("流動負債合計","固定負債合計","株主資本合計","新株予約権")
bs_liab <- bs %>%
  filter(項目 %in% liab_items) %>%
  mutate(項目 = factor(項目, levels = liab_items))

liab_long <- bind_rows(
  bs_liab %>% mutate(期 = period_prev, 金額 = .data[[period_prev]]),
  bs_liab %>% mutate(期 = period_curr, 金額 = .data[[period_curr]])
) %>% select(期, 項目, 金額) %>% filter(金額 > 0)

plot_ly(liab_long, x = ~期, y = ~金額, color = ~項目,
        type = "bar",
        colors = c("#d73027","#fc8d59","#1a9641","#fdae61")) %>%
  layout(
    barmode = "stack",
    xaxis = list(title = ""),
    yaxis = list(title = "千円", tickformat = ",d"),
    legend = list(orientation = "h", y = -0.2),
    margin = list(t = 30)
  )
```

Column {data-width=250}
-------------------------------------

### 財務健全性指標

```{r}
ratios <- data.frame(
  指標      = c("流動比率","自己資本比率","負債比率","ROA","ROE"),
  前期 = c(
    round(get_bs("流動資産合計", period_prev) / get_bs("流動負債合計", period_prev) * 100, 1),
    round(get_bs("純資産合計",   period_prev) / get_bs("資産合計",     period_prev) * 100, 1),
    round(get_bs("負債合計",     period_prev) / get_bs("純資産合計",   period_prev) * 100, 1),
    round(get_pl_prev("当期純利益")           / get_bs("資産合計",     period_prev) * 100, 1),
    summary5$ROE[nrow(summary5) - 1]
  ),
  当期 = c(
    round(ca_curr / cl_curr * 100, 1),
    round(eq_curr / asset_curr * 100, 1),
    round(liab_curr / eq_curr * 100, 1),
    round(ni_curr / asset_curr * 100, 1),
    roe_curr
  )
)

plot_ly(ratios, y = ~指標) %>%
  add_bars(x = ~前期, name = period_prev, orientation = "h",
           marker = list(color = col_neutral)) %>%
  add_bars(x = ~当期, name = period_curr, orientation = "h",
           marker = list(color = col_main)) %>%
  layout(
    barmode = "group",
    xaxis = list(title = "%"),
    legend = list(orientation = "h", y = -0.15),
    margin = list(t = 30)
  )
```

### 総資産・純資産トレンド

```{r}
plot_ly(summary5, x = ~決算年月) %>%
  add_bars(y = ~総資産, name = "総資産",
           marker = list(color = "#aec7e8")) %>%
  add_bars(y = ~純資産, name = "純資産",
           marker = list(color = col_main)) %>%
  layout(
    barmode = "overlay",
    xaxis = list(title = ""),
    yaxis = list(title = "千円", tickformat = ",d"),
    legend = list(orientation = "h", y = -0.15),
    margin = list(t = 30)
  )
```

Column {data-width=400}
-------------------------------------

### 貸借対照表 詳細

```{r}
bs_disp <- bs %>%
  mutate(
    増減額 = .data[[period_curr]] - .data[[period_prev]],
    前期_表示 = format(.data[[period_prev]], big.mark = ","),
    当期_表示 = format(.data[[period_curr]], big.mark = ","),
    増減_表示 = paste0(ifelse(増減額 >= 0, "＋", ""),
                      format(増減額, big.mark = ","))
  ) %>%
  select(区分, 項目, 前期_表示, 当期_表示, 増減_表示)

datatable(
  bs_disp,
  colnames = c("区分", "項目", paste0(period_prev,"（千円）"),
               paste0(period_curr,"（千円）"), "増減額"),
  rownames = FALSE,
  options = list(pageLength = 25, dom = "t", ordering = FALSE),
  class = "compact stripe"
)
```
